prompt: Just got a referral from our investor network -- Cassandra Oyelaran, VP of Revenue Operations at TerraGrid Energy. They're a Series C cleantech company, about 450 employees, $85M ARR, headquartered in...
assertions: Score output includes all three dimensions (Fit, Timing, Engagement) with individual per-criterion point breakdowns and brief explanations for each criterion scored
Total score is the arithmetic sum of the three dimension subtotals, does not exceed 100, and falls in the 80-100 HOT range given the strong signals across all three dimensions

Timing score includes points for the Series D funding announcement (up to 15 pts) and rapid hiring in target department (up to 10 pts), both sourced with recency context -- the score is not based solely on Fit

Score rationale is 2-3 sentences explaining why TerraGrid is buying-ready right now (funding creating budget, ops leadership evaluating tools, active engagement pattern) rather than just restating the numeric breakdown

Recommended action specifies a route (e.g. senior AE or named rep), outreach channel and timing (e.g. direct email or warm intro within 24 hours per HOT SLA), a positioning frame tied to their growth stage, and a first-touch goal
Next review date is set within a short window appropriate to HOT lead urgency (days, not weeks)
